phoneticUs: 藢蓱藧pto蕣藢瑟lek藞tr蓱藧n瑟ks
examples: We are experts in the field of Optoelectronics.
The opportunity and challenge faced by (China's) optoelectronics industry is also analyzed.
The 9th annual global optoelectronics market summary and forecast is due to be distributed to OIDA members in October.
The word from Chi Mei Optoelectronics makes us think that Microsoft and Samsung aren't the only ones to get the 22-inch bug.
And that would really get optoelectronics going.
